header: Start free. Go Pro when speed starts paying for itself.
subheadline: All 255 elements ship in every tier — Community is €0 forever under GPL-2.0. Pro at €49/month (€490/year, recommended) adds priority support and guaranteed LTS updates; Agency at €149/month (€1,490/year) covers unlimited projects with a direct line to the maintainers.

feature_items.label: All 255 elements in every tier, even Community
Pro: priority support, 2-day response, LTS guarantees
Pro: early access to new element drops and preset packs
Pay yearly and get 2 months free (€490 / €1,490)
